title: blemeesd.watch
description: Subscribe to a session's event stream without owning it. The session must exist (error code: session_unknown). Watchers receive every frame the driving client gets (claude.* events, blemeesd.stderr/replay_gap/error) but cannot send claude.user / blemeesd.interrupt / blemeesd.close for that session.

last_seen_seq.description: Optional replay anchor — daemon pushes ring-buffer frames with seq > last_seen_seq before going live.
